description: End of month. 4 WEEKLY_SUMMARIES pre-loaded. Weeks 2 and 4 both have escalations: [elbow_pain_flag]. monthly_eval must detect the cross-week pattern and escalate to annual level.

WEEKLY_SUMMARIES.to_monthly: W2: elbow flag — pull volume concern
W4: elbow flag again — 2nd occurrence this month

mock_llm_responses.monthly_eval_0: {"month": "2026-03", "closed": "2026-03-31", "training": {"weeks_completed": 4, "overall_quality": "moderate", "volume_trend": "stable", "strength_progress": {"Squat": "+3kg e1RM over month", "Bench": "stable"}, "notable": "Good squat progression but elbow issue recurring"}, "health": {"sleep_trend": "stable", "bw_trend": "stable", "readiness_trend": "stable"}, "escalations_handled": ["elbow_pain_flag_w2", "elbow_pain_flag_w4"], "patterns": {"key_insight": "Squat e1RM +3kg — on track for targets", "risk_flags": "Elbow pain flagged twice this month (weeks 2 and 4) — pattern emerging, golfer's elbow risk. Recommend reducing pull volume by 20% for next month."}, "markov_note_for_next_month": "April: maintain squat trajectory, reduce pull volume, monitor elbow", "to_annual": "Elbow flags in weeks 2 and 4 of March. Pattern crosses month boundary. Annual arc should note ongoing pull volume risk and elbow health monitoring.", "escalation_recommendation": "Reduce chin-up/pull-up volume by 20% for April. Replace with face pulls and band work. If elbow flags continue in April, escalate to annual for program restructure.", "escalation_adjustments": ["reduce_pull_volume_20pct_april"]}

expected_flaws: If MONTHLY_SUMMARIES[-1].patterns.risk_flags does not contain 'elbow': monthly_eval failed to synthesize the cross-week elbow pattern from two WEEKLY_SUMMARIES with escalations=[elbow_pain_flag]
If MONTHLY_SUMMARIES[-1].to_annual is empty: monthly_eval did not generate the annual escalation note despite two elbow flags
If MONTHLY_SUMMARIES[-1].escalation_recommendation is null: monthly_eval produced no actionable recommendation despite a cross-week injury pattern

NOTE: This test depends on weekly_eval having correctly populated the escalations field in WEEKLY_SUMMARIES. If weekly_eval doesn't write escalations properly, the monthly pattern detection fails upstream.
